---
title: Upgrade guide
description: Breaking changes and migration steps between versions.
---

# Upgrade guide

## v0.5.0 (current) тАФ Modular packages

### New packages

shadcn-scheduler is now also available as **22 individual packages** under the `@shadcn-scheduler/*` scope. These are additive тАФ existing users of `@sushill/shadcn-scheduler` are not affected.

| New package | Contents |
|-------------|----------|
| `@shadcn-scheduler/core` | Shared types, constants, and pure utilities |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/shell` | `SchedulerProvider` React context |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-month` | `MonthView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-year` | `YearView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-list` | `ListView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-day` | `DayView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-week` | `WeekView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-timeline` | `TimelineView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/view-kanban` | `KanbanView` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-audit` | `useAuditTrail` hook |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-recurrence` | `expandRecurrence` |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-export` | `exportToCSV`, `exportToICS`, `exportToImage`, `exportToPDF` |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-markers` | `useMarkers`, `SchedulerMarker` type |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-dependencies` | `useDependencies`, `ShiftDependency` type |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-histogram` | `useHistogram`, `ResourceHistogram` component |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/plugin-availability` | `useAvailability`, `detectConflicts` |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/preset-tv` | `createTvConfig` |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/preset-healthcare` | `createHealthcareConfig` |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/preset-conference` | `createConferenceConfig` |
| `@shadcn-scheduler/scheduler` | Backward-compatible fat bundle |

### Breaking changes

**None.** The existing `@sushill/shadcn-scheduler` package and API are unchanged. The new `@shadcn-scheduler/*` packages are an optional, parallel install path.

### Migration (optional)

If you want to adopt the modular packages in a new project or migrate an existing one:

```tsx
// Before (still works)
import { Scheduler, createHealthcareConfig } from '@sushill/shadcn-scheduler'

// After тАФ fat bundle (same API, new package name)
import { Scheduler, createHealthcareConfig } from '@shadcn-scheduler/scheduler'

// After тАФ tree-shakeable (import only what you use)
import { SchedulerProvider } from '@shadcn-scheduler/shell'
import { MonthView } from '@shadcn-scheduler/view-month'
import { createHealthcareConfig } from '@shadcn-scheduler/preset-healthcare'
```

[тЖТ Full packages reference](/docs/packages)

---

## v0.4.0

### Breaking changes

**`Block.breakStartH` / `Block.breakEndH`** тАФ new optional fields on the `Block` type. Existing blocks without these fields are unaffected. If you have custom TypeScript types that extend `Block`, you may need to add these as optional fields.

### New features

- **2D free drag** тАФ blocks now lift out of their row and follow the cursor freely in 2D. The old cursor ghost div has been removed; the real block element moves via DOM mutation for zero layout reflows.
- **Right-click context menu** тАФ powered by `@radix-ui/react-context-menu`. Add it to your peer dependencies if installing from source.
- **Hover popover** тАФ fixed-position portal that escapes `contain:paint` clipping. Shows employee, category, time range, duration, break, conflict warning.
- **Row modes** тАФ `"category"` (default, stacks shifts) and `"individual"` (one row per employee). Switch in Settings panel.
- **Resizable sidebar** тАФ powered by `react-resizable-panels`. Add to peer dependencies if installing from source.
- **Vertical edge-scroll** тАФ dragging near top/bottom now scrolls vertically.
- **4px desktop drag threshold** тАФ prevents accidental block moves on click.
- **`scrollbarGutter: stable`** тАФ header and grid are now pixel-perfect in sync regardless of vertical scrollbar presence.

### New peer dependencies

```bash
npm install react-resizable-panels @radix-ui/react-context-menu
```

### Migration

No migration steps required for existing code. All new features are additive. The `Block` type has two new optional fields тАФ existing data is backward compatible.

---

## v0.3.x тЖТ v0.3.3

Patch releases only. No breaking changes. Bug fixes to:
- `hourBg()` CSS variable (extra closing paren causing transparent non-working hours)
- ListView day mode "No Shifts" display
- Sidebar literal `\n` text node rendering

---

## v0.2.x тЖТ v0.3.0

### Renamed props

| Old | New |
|-----|-----|
| `onShiftMove` | `onBlockMoved` |
| `onShiftCreate` | `onBlockCreate` |
| `onShiftDelete` | `onBlockDelete` |

### Breaking change: `visibleFrom` / `visibleTo`

These moved from top-level `Scheduler` props into `SchedulerConfig`. Update:

```tsx
// Before (v0.2.x)
<Scheduler visibleFrom={7} visibleTo={22} />

// After (v0.3.0+)
<Scheduler config={createSchedulerConfig({ visibleFrom: 7, visibleTo: 22 })} />
```
